Hero.title: Explore Beautiful
Hero.description: From ancient kingdoms and misty mountains to golden beaches and unforgettable wildlife experiences, explore Sri Lanka with carefully crafted travel packages.

About.title: Why Visit Sri Lanka?
About.description: Sri Lanka is an island paradise packing diverse, breathtaking travel experiences into a compact destination. Known as the "Pearl of the Indian Ocean," it caters to every type of global traveler.

heritage.title: Ancient World Heritage
heritage.desc: Explore over 2,500 years of civilization, featuring 8 UNESCO World Heritage Sites including Sigiriya and Kandy.

highlands.title: Scenic Misty mountains
highlands.desc: Ride the world-famous blue train through cascading tea estates, green hills, and waterfalls in Ella and Nuwara Eliya.

wildlife.title: Rich Wildlife Safaris
wildlife.desc: Embark on open jeep safaris in Yala or Udawalawe to see high leopard densities, sloth bears, and giant elephant herds.

Destinations.title: Top Sri Lanka Destinations
Destinations.description: From ancient archaeological ruins and sacred mountain shrines to misty hills and surf-friendly coastal shores.

items.kandy: Temple of the Tooth in Kandy

Packages.title: Featured Sri Lanka Packages
Packages.description: Handpicked premium tours that combine comfort, adventure, and immersive local experiences. Explore Sri Lanka with our carefully crafted travel packages.

WhyChooseUs.title: Why Travelers Choose Horizon Travel
WhyChooseUs.description: Planning a trip to Sri Lanka shouldn't be stressful. We bridge the gap between dream itineraries and flawless execution, giving you complete freedom to enjoy your travels.

experts.title: Trusted Local Travel Experts
experts.desc: Our team consists of native Sri Lankan trip coordinators who design itineraries leveraging deep local secrets.

hotels.title: Handpicked Hotels
hotels.desc: We personally vet, select, and audit boutique luxury resorts, premium villas, and unique heritage stays.

transport.title: Comfortable Transportation
transport.desc: Travel across Sri Lanka in modern, fully air-conditioned vehicles driven by professional tourist drivers.

itineraries.title: Personalized Itineraries
itineraries.desc: We tailor all tours to match your timeline, desired pace, interests, budget, and travel preferences.

assistance.title: Airport Pickup & Assistance
assistance.desc: A seamless start to your journey with 24/7 airport greeting, dedicated SIM setups, and baggage handling.

support.title: 24/7 Customer Support
support.desc: Immediate traveler assistance on-the-road for booking shifts, emergencies, or real-time query answers.

Testimonials.title: Loved by Travelers Worldwide
Testimonials.description: Read stories from international tourists who explored the rich culture, scenic highlands, and gold coastlines of Sri Lanka with us.

charlotte.name: Charlotte Mercier
charlotte.review: The Hill Country Adventure was spectacular! The scenic train journey to Ella is something we will cherish forever. Highly recommend Horizon Travel for their flawless planning.

liam.name: Liam Kaelen
liam.review: The Cultural Triangle Explorer exceeded all expectations. Sigiriya Rock Fortress is mind-blowing. Our private vehicle was clean, and the English-speaking guide made history come alive.

sarah.name: Sarah Lawson
sarah.review: We booked the Southern Beach Escape. Golden beaches, whale watching in Mirissa, and the historic Galle Fort were incredible. Smooth airport pickup and excellent beach resort selections.

david.name: David Ross
david.review: The Wildlife Safari Experience was absolute magic! We saw leopards, sloth bears, and herds of wild elephants in Yala. Highly professional drivers and beautiful national park resorts.

Contact.title: Plan Your Journey
Contact.description: Ready to explore? Drop us a line. Our dedicated travel planners will respond to you within 24 hours to schedule a custom consultation.
Contact.titleCta: Design Your Dream Sri Lankan Getaway
Contact.descCta: Use our step-by-step customization wizard to design a personalized itinerary. Choose destinations, select activities, and lock in pricing details with our local travel specialists.
Contact.bullet1: Curated local guides and private transport options.
Contact.bullet3: Personal specialist coordinates every booking detail.

Footer.desc: Crafting premium travel experiences and lifelong memories. Explore the world's most breathtaking destinations with our dedicated team of travel experts.

Home.managePlans: Manage your Sri Lanka travel plans, requests, and preferences from one secure and beautiful dashboard.
Home.sigiriyaTip: The best time to visit Sri Lanka is December–April for sunny beaches and lush hill country.
Home.ourTeamRecommends: Our team recommends these iconic places for your next escape.
Home.specialistsTailor: Our Ceylon travel specialists can tailor the itinerary around your preferences and schedule.
Home.tip2: Scenic train routes and tea country
Home.accessControls: Access your account controls from the main dashboard.
Home.signedInHorizon: Signed in to your Horizon Travel account.
Home.seeConnected: See how your dashboard account is connected.
Home.fullSettingsNotice: Use the full settings page for password changes and other account actions.

MyRequests.title: My Travel Requests
MyRequests.description: Track your pending, approved, and cancelled journeys.
MyRequests.submitRequestDesc: Submit a request through the travel form to see it appear here.

RequestHistory.title: Request History
RequestHistory.description: Review all of your submitted requests and their latest status.
RequestHistory.willContact: Our travel team will contact you shortly.
RequestHistory.pastRequestsDesc: Your completed and past travel requests will appear here.

Settings.googleManaged: Password is managed through your Google account.
Settings.sessionDesc: Sign out of your current dashboard session.
Settings.deleteDesc: This action is irreversible and removes your account and travel requests.

CustomizeTour.subtitle: Itinerary Architect
CustomizeTour.title: Interactive Tour Customizer
CustomizeTour.description: Choose a starting base tour, then use the live map pins to dynamically route destinations. Configure travelers, nights, and meals with instant estimates.
CustomizeTour.mapInstruction: Click pins on the map to add/remove cities. Visual lines connect chosen routes in sequence.
CustomizeTour.hoverPin: Hover over any pin to preview highlights.
CustomizeTour.clickPinEdit: Click Map Pin to Edit Route
CustomizeTour.placeholderPreferences: E.g. dietary instructions, airport pick-up flight info, hotel notes...
CustomizeTour.planningAsGuest: Planning as guest. Submit booking redirects to login to authorize your custom request.
CustomizeTour.savedDesc: Your customized itinerary is successfully stored as a request in our databases. An agency coordinator will review the pricing breakdown and confirm your slots.
CustomizeTour.selectStartDate: Please select a preferred start date.
CustomizeTour.futureDate: Departure date must be in the future.
CustomizeTour.correctErrors: Please correct validation issues before booking.
CustomizeTour.redirectLogin: Redirecting to secure login. Your configuration is preserved.
CustomizeTour.customizedTourSaved: Your customized Ceylon tour is saved.

baseTours.culturalDesc: A 5-day historic route visiting ancient capitals and temples.
baseTours.southernDesc: A 6-day coastal escape focusing on sun, history, and safari.
baseTours.hillDesc: A 6-day misty mountain loops, train tours, and waterfalls.
baseTours.customDesc: Build your own itinerary from scratch utilizing the map pins.
